basis: CIF NWE / Dated Brent physical proxy
note: Brent has fallen to about $72 — its lowest since February — and WTI below $71 as Hormuz oil flows recovered toward ~75% of pre-war levels and the market priced returning supply. A vessel was struck off Oman (UN evacuation paused), so a war-risk floor remains, but the dominant move is lower. Note the rotation: crude is easing while refined-product differentials (diesel especially) stay tight. This estimate tracks the softer benchmark — an editorial proxy, not a traded quote. Indicative; watch tanker-transit data over the rhetoric.
